patch.value: SDK invoke helpers for importers & exporters: runRegisteredImporterForTest + runRegisteredExporterForTest

Complete the SDK package-author 'invoke' verb by adding name-based invoke helpers for the last two executable registration surfaces without one: importers and exporters. registerImporter/registerExporter wrap their handlers into command paths ('<name> import' / '<name> export'), so today they are invokable only via runRegisteredCommandForTest with a hand-derived command path. The new runRegisteredImporterForTest(activation, { importer }) / runRegisteredExporterForTest(activation, { exporter }) resolve by registration name (validating via assertRegisteredImporter/Exporter), derive the command path internally, and return the same CommandHandlerResult. Now every executable register* surface has both an assertRegistered* and a runRegistered*ForTest counterpart.
